objects.description: Telnet protocol client for remote connections

objects.description: Netcat - arbitrary TCP/UDP connections and listening

objects.description: Versatile networking utility for reading/writing data across TCP and UDP connections, port scanning, and network debugging.

objects.name: sftp

objects.name: Certipy
objects.description: Active Directory Certificate Services (AD CS) exploitation tool that finds vulnerable certificate templates, escrows, and performs ESC1-ESC8 attacks for domain privilege escalation.

objects.name: enum4linux-ng
objects.description: Python reimplementation of enum4linux for comprehensive SMB and NetBIOS enumeration of Windows and Active Directory targets.

objects.name: kerbrute
objects.description: Tool for performing Kerberos pre-authentication brute-forcing, user enumeration, and password spraying against Active Directory.

objects.name: ldapsearch
objects.description: LDAP directory search tool for querying Active Directory to enumerate users, groups, computers, organizational units, and domain policies.

objects.name: psexec
objects.description: Impacket psexec — Windows remote command execution via SMB service control manager for lateral movement in Active Directory environments.

objects.name: rpcclient
objects.description: Samba RPC client for executing MS-RPC functions against Windows systems for user, group, domain, and privilege enumeration.

objects.name: rubeus
objects.description: Kerberos abuse toolkit for Windows for performing AS-REP roasting, Kerberoasting, pass-the-ticket, S4U attacks, and Kerberos ticket manipulation.

objects.name: secretsdump
objects.description: Impacket secretsdump tool that extracts NTLM hashes, Kerberos keys, and credential material from Windows systems via NTDS.dit, SAM, and LSA techniques.

objects.name: sharphound
objects.description: BloodHound data collector written in C# that enumerates Active Directory relationships, ACLs, group memberships, and session information for attack path analysis.

objects.name: smbclient
objects.description: SMB/CIFS client for accessing and managing file shares on Windows systems, part of the Samba suite of interoperability tools.

objects.name: smbmap
objects.description: SMB enumeration tool that provides recursive listing, file download/upload, and command execution across SMB shares on Windows networks.

objects.name: wmiexec
objects.description: Impacket tool for semi-interactive remote command execution over Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) without deploying services or agents.

objects.name: patator
objects.description: Multi-protocol brute-forcing tool that supports FTP, SSH, HTTP, SMTP, SNMP, and many other services for login credential testing.

objects.name: cewl
objects.description: Custom wordlist generator that spiders websites to gather unique words for crafting targeted password lists.

objects.name: crunch
objects.description: Wordlist generator that produces all possible combinations and permutations of specified character sets.

objects.name: cupp
objects.description: Common User Passwords Profiler — generates intelligent wordlists based on personal profile information gathered from the target.

objects.name: hash-identifier
objects.description: Simple hash identification tool that determines the probable hash type from a given hash string.

objects.name: hashcat
objects.description: World's fastest password recovery tool supporting GPU acceleration, hundreds of hash types, and advanced attack modes.

objects.name: hydra
objects.description: Very fast parallel network logon cracker supporting numerous protocols for brute-force authentication testing.

objects.name: john
objects.description: Leading password cracking tool supporting hundreds of hash types with multiple cracking modes (single, wordlist, incremental, external).

objects.name: medusa
objects.description: Parallel network login auditor for brute-forcing authentication across multiple protocols and services.

objects.name: ncrack
objects.description: High-speed network authentication cracking tool for testing credential strength across multiple network services.

objects.name: rsmangler
objects.description: Wordlist mangling/generation tool that takes a base wordlist and applies transformation rules to create variants.

objects.name: mimikatz
objects.description: Post-exploitation credential extraction tool that recovers plaintext passwords, NTLM hashes, Kerberos tickets, and DPAPI keys from Windows memory and registry hives.

objects.name: openssl
objects.description: Comprehensive cryptographic toolkit for SSL/TLS, certificate management, encryption, hashing, and key generation.

objects.name: dnsrecon
objects.description: DNS enumeration script that performs SRV record discovery, subdomain bruteforce, DNSSEC testing, zone transfer attempts, and reverse DNS lookups.

objects.description: DoS testing tool that simulates Slow HTTP attacks including Slowloris, Slow HTTP POST, and Slow Read to test server resilience against application-layer DoS.

objects.name: evil-winrm
objects.description: WinRM shell for remote Windows administration and post-exploitation, supporting plaintext, pass-the-hash, and Kerberos PKINIT authentication.

objects.name: beef
objects.description: Browser Exploitation Framework for assessing browser security through client-side attack vectors and hooking.

objects.name: covenant

objects.name: empire
objects.description: PowerShell-based post-exploitation framework for staged and stageless payloads with encrypted C2 communication.

objects.description: Modern post-exploitation command and control framework with a GUI interface, supporting agent communication, payload generation, and team collaboration.

objects.name: merlin
objects.description: Cross-platform post-exploitation C2 framework written in Go, supporting HTTP/2, gRPC, and WebSocket communication for agent management.

objects.name: metasploit
objects.description: Full-featured exploitation framework with thousands of modules for exploit development, payload generation, and post-exploitation.

objects.name: mythic
objects.description: Collaborative red team C2 framework with a web UI, multi-agent support, and extensible payload agents for post-exploitation operations.

objects.name: pupy
objects.description: Cross-platform remote administration and post-exploitation framework written in Python, supporting in-memory execution, multiple transports, and extensible modules.

objects.name: routersploit
objects.description: Router exploitation framework with modules for scanning, exploiting, and fuzzing embedded devices.

objects.name: searchsploit
objects.description: Command-line search tool for the Exploit-DB archive, enabling offline searching of exploits and shellcode.

objects.name: setoolkit
objects.description: Social Engineer Toolkit for automating credential harvesting, phishing campaigns, and payload generation.

objects.name: shellter
objects.description: Dynamic shellcode injection tool for creating backdoored portable executables while maintaining original functionality.

objects.name: sliver
objects.description: Implant-based C2 framework for adversary simulation, red team operations, and post-exploitation.

objects.name: veil
objects.description: Veil framework for generating Metasploit-compatible payloads that bypass common anti-virus solutions.

objects.name: autopsy
objects.description: GUI-based digital forensics platform built on The Sleuth Kit for disk image analysis, file carving, and timeline generation.

objects.name: exiftool
objects.description: Perl-based metadata reader and writer for extracting EXIF, IPTC, XMP, and other metadata from files.

objects.name: steghide
objects.description: Steganography tool for embedding and extracting hidden data within image and audio files.

objects.name: volatility

objects.name: impacket

objects.description: GraphQL schema enumeration tool that uses introspection queries and field suggestion brute-force to recover API schema definitions.

objects.name: endlessh
